description_long: This object is a whole Hass avocado with a characteristic pear-like shape, featuring a slightly bumpy, dark green skin with small yellow-green speckles. The surface is semi-glossy and uneven, with a few minor blemishes and a visible stem at the top. The skin texture appears tough and leathery, typical of ripe avocados, and the color is consistent with a mature fruit. The avocado is uncut, so the creamy, pale green interior and large central seed are not visible. Its size and proportions suggest it is a standard, hand-held fruit, likely weighing a few hundred grams. The object is isolated against a plain white background, with no other items or context present.
description: A whole, ripe Hass avocado with bumpy, dark green skin and a visible stem, isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broadest side of the avocado, highlighting its bumpy, dark green skin and subtle speckling.
description_view_1: This view displays a slightly narrower side, with the skin's texture and color remaining consistent and a minor blemish visible.
description_view_2: The stem end is more visible here, with the top of the avocado and its rough, green skin clearly shown.
description_view_3: This angle provides the clearest view of the stem, with the skin's texture and color uniform and a few small spots present.
attribute_skin_blemishes: minor dark spots and a small scar
